summary: Improved theme-aware colors across Progress and Active Session modules.

notes: Fixed theme-aware colors in Progress Details and Active Session sheets
Replaced hardcoded dark-only colors with adaptive CSS variables
All cards, labels, and borders now respond correctly to theme changes
Added Missed/Skip option to task completion prompt
Time-safe rescheduling — past time slots are now disabled
Removed hardcoded demo data — all stats now use real user data
Simplified swipe-to-delete: single tap, immediate action with undo
Built Active Session sheet with live countdown timer
Added real-time progress bar across all schedule views
Notification scheduler with browser push support
Workload balance sheet with interactive filters
